args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
explain_json=$(mktemp)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- explain --format json --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness > "$explain_json"
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness >/dev/null
python3 - "$explain_json" "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json" "$bundle_dir/verification_report.json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
explain = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
buildplan = json.load(open(sys.argv[2]))
verification = json.load(open(sys.argv[3]))
assert explain['plan']['structural_identity']['plan_identity'] == buildplan['structural_identity']['plan_identity']
assert explain['verification']['status'] == verification['status']
PY
printf 'aligned\n'
